C

COMMON - Enum constant in enum me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.CosmeticRarity
Represents the common rarity.
compareTo(StructurePoint) - Method in class me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.structure.StructurePoint
 
CompletionCriteria - Class in me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics
Represents Criteria needed to unlock a Cosmetic
Cosmetic - Interface in me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics
Parent Interface for Base Cosmetics, ready for material, particle, or entity implementations.
CosmeticLocation<T> - Interface in me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.registry
Represents a specific entry for a cosmetic.
CosmeticRarity - Enum in me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics
Represents a rarity used in a Cosmetic.
CosmeticRegistry - Interface in me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.registry
Represents the registry for all StarCosmetics Cosmetics.
CustomLocation - Interface in me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.custom
Represents a custom cosmetic, activated when an item is clicked from the inventory.

D

DEFAULT_REMOVAL_TIME - Static variable in class me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.structure.Structure
Represents the default removal time, in ticks, of a Structure (30 seconds).

E

EPIC - Enum constant in enum me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.CosmeticRarity
Represents the epic rarity.
equals(Object) - Method in class me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.structure.StructurePoint
 

F

fromCompletion(PlayerCompletion) - Static method in class me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.CompletionCriteria
Generates a CompletionCriteria from a PlayerCompletion.
fromCrafted(int, Collection<Material>) - Static method in class me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.CompletionCriteria
Generates a CompletionCriteria with Statistic.CRAFT_ITEM, using multiple.
fromCrafted(int, Material) - Static method in class me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.CompletionCriteria
Generates a CompletionCriteria with Statistic.CRAFT_ITEM.
fromCrafted(int, Material...) - Static method in class me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.CompletionCriteria
Generates a CompletionCriteria with Statistic.CRAFT_ITEM, using multiple.
fromKilled(int, EntityType) - Static method in class me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.CompletionCriteria
Generates a CompletionCriteria with Statistic.KILL_ENTITY.
fromMined(int, Collection<Material>) - Static method in class me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.CompletionCriteria
Generates a CompletionCriteria with Statistic.MINE_BLOCK, using multiple.
fromMined(int, Material) - Static method in class me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.CompletionCriteria
Generates a CompletionCriteria with Statistic.MINE_BLOCK.
fromMined(int, Material...) - Static method in class me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.CompletionCriteria
Generates a CompletionCriteria with Statistic.MINE_BLOCK, using multiple.
fromStatistic(Statistic, int) - Static method in class me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.CompletionCriteria
Generates a CompletionCriteria with a Bukkit Statistic.

Fetches a String from the Language File.

Fetches a list of all registered CosmeticLocations.

Fetches a list of Locations for a specific Cosmetic.

Fetches a CosmeticLocation by CosmeticLocation.getFullKey().

Fetches the item, that upon clicked, will cause this custom cosmetic to run.

Fetches the criteria required to unlock this CosmeticLocation.

Fetches the plugin's data folder.

Fetches the default value of this setting.

Fetches the display message of this criteria.

Fetches the display name of this cosmetic.

getDisplayName() - Method in enum me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.player.PlayerSetting
Fetches the setting's display name.

Fetches the Event Class used in this SoundCosmetic.

Fetches the File this configuration is stored in.

Fetches the full key.
getIcon() - Method in interface me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.Cosmetic
Fetches the inventory icon of this cosmetic.
getInput() - Method in interface me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.registry.CosmeticLocation
Fetches the input used in Cosmetic.run(Location, CosmeticLocation).

Fetches the input type of this CosmeticLocation.
getKey() - Method in interface me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.registry.CosmeticLocation
Fetches the key of this cosmetic location.

Fetches the current Language.

Fetches a Map of StructurePoints to Materials that the Structure will place.

Fetches a String from the Language File with the plugin prefix in front.
getMessage(String, String) - Method in interface me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.StarConfig
Fetches a String from the Language File with the plugin prefix in front.

Fetches the namespace of this Comsmetic.

Fetches the namespace of this cosmetic location that would belong to parent Cosmetic.

Fetches the type of the object used in the trail.

Fetches the parent of this cosmetic location.

Fetches the OfflinePlayer used to construct this StarPlayer.

Whether or not the player has the specified setting enabled.

Whether or not the player has the specified setting enabled.

getType() - Method in interface me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.trail.Trail
Fetches the type of this trail.

Fetches the criteria needed to unlock a Cosmetic for the first time.

Fetches the relative X distance to the Center.
getY() - Method in class me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.structure.StructurePoint
Fetches the relative Y distance to the Center.
getZ() - Method in class me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.structure.StructurePoint
Fetches the relative Z distance to the Center.

Represents a Trail that will follow around a Player's Movements

M

me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api - package me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api
Main StarCosmetics API Package
me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics - package me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics
Package relating to Cosmetics API.
me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.custom - package me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.custom
Package related to Custom Cosmetics.
me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.particle - package me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.particle
Package related to Particle-Specific Cosmetics
me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.registry - package me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.registry
Package related to Cosmetic Registration.
me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.sound - package me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.sound
Package related to Cosmetics that play sounds or sequences of sounds.
me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.structure - package me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.structure
Package relating to custom StarCosmetics Structures as Cosmetics.
me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.trail - package me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.trail
 
me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.player - package me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.player
Package relating to StarCosmetics Player API.
MYTHICAL - Enum constant in enum me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.CosmeticRarity
Represents the mythical rarity.

N

NETHER_ROOF - Enum constant in enum me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.player.PlayerCompletion
Completion for reaching the roof of the Nether.

O

OCCASIONAL - Enum constant in enum me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.CosmeticRarity
Represents the occasional rarity.

P

ParticleShape - Interface in me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.particle
Represents a StarCosmetics Particle Shape.
ParticleSize - Enum in me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.particle
Represents the Particle Size Display for a ParticleShape.
place(Location) - Method in class me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.structure.Structure
Places this Structure WITHOUT automatically removing it.
placeAndRemove(Location, long) - Method in class me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.structure.Structure
Places this Structure.
PlayerCompletion - Enum in me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.player
Represents a custom completion a player has to achieve to unlock cosmetics, through any toggled event.
PlayerSetting - Enum in me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.player
Represents a setting available to players.
print(Throwable) - Static method in interface me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.StarConfig
Prints a Throwable in the StarCosmetics Logger.
PROJECTILE - Enum constant in enum me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.trail.TrailType
Represents a Trail that will apply to a Player's thrown Projectiles
PROJECTILE_SOUND - Enum constant in enum me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.trail.TrailType
Represents a Trail that will also apply to a Player's thrown Projectiles, but only with Sound

R

RARE - Enum constant in enum me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.CosmeticRarity
Represents the rare rarity.
run(Entity, CosmeticLocation<?>) - Method in interface me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.trail.Trail
Runs a CosmeticLocation based on this parent.
run(Location, CosmeticLocation<?>) - Method in interface me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.Cosmetic
Runs a CosmeticLocation based on this parent.
run(Location, CosmeticLocation<?>) - Method in interface me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.trail.Trail
Deprecated.
use Trail.run(Entity, CosmeticLocation)

Represents the secret rarity.

setSetting(PlayerSetting, boolean) - Method in class me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.player.StarPlayer
Sets the specified setting to the specified value.

Represents a small, detailed Particle Ring.
SMALL_RING - Enum constant in enum me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.particle.ParticleSize
Represetns a small Particle Ring.

Represents a sound, playable on any PlayerEvent.
SPECIAL - Enum constant in enum me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.cosmetics.CosmeticRarity
Represents the special rarity.

Represents the main StarCosmetics Configuration.
StarPlayer - Class in me.gamercoder215.starcosmetics.api.player
Represents a player used by StarCosmetics to manage their configuration.

Constructs a new StarPlayer.

Represents a StarCosmetics Structure

Represents a point on a Structure.
